_description: Customer-facing email templates per disposition. Used in step 9 of the agent's instructions block.
_calibrationStatus: STARTER — confirm brand voice + signature with HKP customer
_signature: AMETEK Haydon Kerk Pittman — Warranty & RMA Team\nhkp-warranty@ametek.com

approve_replace.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Approved for Replacement
approve_replace.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

Good news — your RMA for serial {{serialNumber}} has been approved for replacement under warranty.

What happens next:

  1. A return shipping label is attached to this email — please use it to send the failed unit to our service center.
  2. Once we receive the unit, a replacement will ship within 5 business days.
  3. You'll get a tracking number when the replacement ships.

Reference: {{claimNumber}} — please keep this for your records.

Thanks,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team

approve_repair.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Approved for Repair
approve_repair.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

Your RMA for serial {{serialNumber}} has been approved for repair under warranty.

Please use the attached return shipping label to send the unit to our service center. Repair turnaround is typically 7-10 business days.

Reference: {{claimNumber}}

Thanks,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team

approve_refund.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Refund Approved (Pending Manager Review)
approve_refund.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

Your RMA for serial {{serialNumber}} has been approved for a refund. Manager final approval is required and typically takes 2 business days.

You'll receive a follow-up email once the credit memo is issued.

Reference: {{claimNumber}}

Thanks,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team

reject.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Update on Your Warranty Claim
reject.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

We've reviewed your RMA for serial {{serialNumber}}. Unfortunately we're unable to accept this claim under warranty.

Reason: {{rejectionReason}}

We'd be happy to provide a paid-repair quote if you're interested — please reply YES to this email and we'll send you the quote within 1 business day.

Reference: {{claimNumber}}

Thanks for your understanding,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team

request_more_info.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Additional Information Needed
request_more_info.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

Thanks for your warranty request on serial {{serialNumber}}. To complete our review, we need a few more details:

    {{#evidenceGaps}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/evidenceGaps}}

Please reply with this information and we'll continue the evaluation. If you have photos or error codes, please attach them.

Reference: {{claimNumber}}

Thanks,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team

escalate_to_engineer.subject: RMA {{claimNumber}} — Under Engineering Review
escalate_to_engineer.bodyHtml:
Hello {{firstName}},

Your RMA for serial {{serialNumber}} has been routed to our quality engineering team for review. This typically happens when the failure mode requires deeper analysis.

One of our engineers will respond within 3 business days with a disposition or a request for additional information.

Reference: {{claimNumber}}

Thanks for your patience,
AMETEK HKP — Warranty & RMA Team
